Tanks

Class Explosion

  • java.lang.Object
    • Tanks.Explosion

  • public class Explosion
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents an explosion in the game. Each explosion has a position, radius, and duration, and can update its progress and affect the terrain.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Explosion(int x, int y, int radius)
      Create a new explosion with the given position and radius.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void draw(App app)
      Draws the explosion.
      float getProgress()
      Gets the progress of the explosion animation.
      int getRadius()
      Gets the radius of the explosion.
      int getX()
      Gets the x-coordinate of the explosion.
      int getY()
      Gets the y-coordinate of the explosion.
      int[] terrainExplosion(int[] terrainHeight)
      Modifies the terrain height array based on the explosion.
      void update()
      Updates the explosion animation progress.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Explosion

        public Explosion(int x,
                 int y,
                 int radius)
        Create a new explosion with the given position and radius.
        Parameters:
        x - x-coordinate of the explosion
        y - y-coordinate of the explosion
        radius - the radius of the explosion

    • Method Detail

      • getX

        public int getX()
        Gets the x-coordinate of the explosion.
        Returns:
        the x-coordinate of the explosion

      • getY

        public int getY()
        Gets the y-coordinate of the explosion.
        Returns:
        the y-coordinate of the explosion

      • getRadius

        public int getRadius()
        Gets the radius of the explosion.
        Returns:
        the radius of the explosion

      • getProgress

        public float getProgress()
        Gets the progress of the explosion animation.
        Returns:
        the progress of the explosion animation

      • update

        public void update()
        Updates the explosion animation progress.

      • terrainExplosion

        public int[] terrainExplosion(int[] terrainHeight)
        Modifies the terrain height array based on the explosion.
        Parameters:
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights
        Returns:
        the modified terrain height array

      • draw

        public void draw(App app)
        Draws the explosion.
        Parameters:
        app - the application instance
